query:
SELECT 
  ma.id AS agendamento_id,
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.title,
  ma.status,
  ma.consultorId,
  c.name AS mentor_nome
FROM mentor_appointments ma
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ma.consultorId = c.id
WHERE ma.consultorId = 39
AND ma.scheduledDate IN ('2026-03-01', '2026-03-06', '2026-03-20', '2026-03-21')
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate;
